'''Operation: Quick Strike''' was a campaign fought by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] against the forces of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The missions depict engagements involving both Rebel attacks and Imperial reprisals, ranging from strike missions to rescue missions.<ref name="XWvTF" />

==Battles==
===Attack on Imperial Factory Drekker===
{{Main|Battle of Yerej}}
[[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|VSD]] [[Inexorable (Victory-class)|''Inexorable'']] has to defend the Drekker Industries Special Materials Factory ''[[Drekker]]'' in the [[Yerej system/Legends|Yerej system]] from Rebel [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|FRG]] ''[[Meteor (frigate)|Meteor]]'' and its [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] starfighters.<ref name="XWvTF" />

===Ambush of Rebel Supply Recovery from Obran Cluster===
{{Main|Battle of the Obran Cluster}}
Imperial [[Beta-class ETR-3 escort transport|ETR]] ''Trap Door'' has deployed a minefield around a rebel supply cache in the [[Obran Cluster/Legends|Obran Cluster]] and [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Gunboats]] ambush Rebel forces that come to recover the supplies with [[Heavy Lifter/Legends|Heavy Lifter]] group HLF ''Beetle''.<ref name="XWvTF" />

===Attack on Tortali Platform===
{{Main|Battle of Tortali IV}}
The Imperial [[Tortali Platform|''supply platform'']] in the [[Tortali system/Legends|Tortali system]] comes under heavy attack from Rebel starfighters and [[Strike-class medium cruiser|STRKC]] ''[[Huntsman]]'' comes to its aid.<ref name="XWvTF" />

===Ambush Arms Smugglers near Ytha'ac Cluster===
{{Main|Battle near the Ytha'ac Cluster}}
Rebel [[Cargo ferry|Cargo Ferry]] group ''[[Rongo]]'' receives a shipment of stolen Imperial munitions from [[Airam (group)|Airam]] smugglers (two ships of CARG group ''[[Fanir]]'') in the [[Ytha'ac Cluster/Legends|Ytha'ac Cluster]] when Imperial Gunboats, [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|''Gamma''-class ATR-6 assault transports]] and [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avenger]] starfighters arrive to reclaim the containers.<ref name="XWvTF" />

===Interdiction of Starfighter Deployment===
{{Main|Battle of Gaerboud IV}}
[[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|ISD]] [[Dauntless (Imperial-class)/Legends|''Dauntless'']] has arrived at [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility]] [[Sentinel (Deep Space Manufacturing Facility)|''Sentinel'']] near [[Gaerboud IV]] to receive newly produced ''TIE Avenger'' starfighters. Rebel starfighters attempt to destroy the ''TIE Avengers'' while they are being flown to the ''Dauntless'' by untrained workers. If the Rebel starfighters are unsuccessful in destroying enough "TIE Advanced" then their last option is to send in the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|frigate]] [[Rehz'nor]] which will send X-wings and Y-wings in an attempt to destroy the Dauntless.<ref name="XWvTF" />

===Attack on Rebel Convoy near Athega===
{{Main|Battle near Athega}}
Imperial fighters attack Rebel [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] (eleven ships of CRV group [[Athega (corvette group)|''Athega'']]) as they move through the [[Athega system]].<ref name="XWvTF" />

===Rescue from Imperial Prison Ship Dargon===
{{Main|Rescue from the Dargon}}
In an attempt to free Rebel and [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] spies, Rebel forces including [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|CRS]] ''[[Columbia]]'' and ATR ''Typhoon'' attack the Dreadnought ''[[Dargon]]'' which is defended by VSD ''[[Callisto]]'' and TIE Avenger starfighters.<ref name="XWvTF" />

===Hit and Fade on Elliirad Platform===
{{Main|Battle of Elliirad}}
During a starfighter attack against an [[Elliirad Platform|''Imperial Cargo Transfer Station'']] in the [[Elliirad system/Legends|Elliirad system]] the Rebels use [[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle|Escort shuttle]] ''Upsilon'' with its feigned Imperial registry to deploy a demolition team to the platform in an attempt to sabotage the facility. During the attack, a number of Imperial freighters come under attack as well, namely the Cargo Ferries (CARG) ''[[Slainte]]'', ''[[Lesyta]]'', ''[[Rugin]]'', ''[[Tanyay]]'' and the Modular Conveyors (CNVYR) ''[[Posi]]'', ''[[Mhath]]'', ''[[Luung]]'' and ''[[Weema]]''.<ref name="XWvTF" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|In an effort to weaken the Empire's war machine, the Rebel Alliance takes the initiative by launching a series of strikes against Imperial military targets. It hopes to disrupt its military production and supply operation.|In-game Battle description|<ref name="XWvTF" />}}
Operation: Quick Strike is a "Battle" in the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' computer game, i.e. a set of eight different missions grouped together without forming a coherent campaign. Battles do not follow a storyline and the missions have no clear chronological order.<ref name="XWvTF" />

Although the occurrence of the individual missions can be considered canonical, the outcome depends on the player's actions. Therefore, the actual canonical outcome of each mission is unclear. It is safe to assume that no side achieved a lasting effect (such as the destruction of a starship) over the course of the Battle.<ref name="XWvTF" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' {{1st}}
